title: DVDES-737 The Magic Mirror Service: The Captivating Beautician Who Captivates Customers - Will the beauty and healing specialist who works at a women-only salon get turned on when she sees a man's erect penis in front of her?
overview: This time on the Magic Mirror Van, we're featuring beauticians, beauty and healing specialists who work in Ginza and Ebisu! We've got high-level beauties with polished looks and a calm demeanor that relaxes customers both physically and mentally! These women who usually serve beauty are now offering naughty service! They showed us their erotic faces, which they don't show at the salon, on the MM van! [※The faces are blurred in the main video.]
